name: IAMGOLD Corporation
description: IAMGOLD Corporation is an intermediate gold producer with operations in Ontario (Côté Gold mine, 60% interest), Quebec (Westwood mine), and Burkina Faso (Essakane mine, 90% interest). The Côté Gold mine, one of Canada's largest, achieved full nameplate capacity in June 2025 and is now the company's flagship asset. IAMGOLD produced 765,900 attributable gold ounces in 2025 and is guiding for 720,000 to 820,000 ounces in 2026 while planning a Côté expansion study.
